overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic survival game showing a character navigating a dark forest trail during a heavy rainstorm. The character uses a flashlight to illuminate the path, crosses a rocky stream, and explores the terrain before continuing along the trail.

events.description: lightning flash illuminates the sky through the trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest trail with flashlight illuminating the path ahead

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees lining the left side of the trail
narrow dirt path winding through the forest
thick underbrush and vegetation flanking both sides of the trail
large boulders emerging from the vegetation on the left

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow forest trail during a heavy rainstorm, illuminated only by the flashlight. Tall pine trees line the path while dense bushes flank both sides. A sudden lightning flash briefly illuminates the sky through the canopy as the character passes large rocks on the left.

events.description: trail transitions to rocky terrain as the stream comes into view

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating over rocks and boulders near the water's edge

entered.detail: flowing water visible to the right of the rocky path
uneven rocky ground replacing the dirt trail

segments.scene_description: The dirt trail gives way to rocky terrain as the character approaches a stream. Large boulders dominate the center of the frame while the water flows on the right. The character carefully picks their way across the wet rocks, with pine trees still visible in the background.

events.description: character stops on the rocks to observe the surroundings
character resumes moving along the rocky edge

agents.ego_description: standing on a rocky outcrop, panning the flashlight to survey the stream and surrounding area

entered.detail: prominent rock formation overlooking the water

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky outcrop beside the stream, panning the camera to survey the misty surroundings. Sparse bushes dot the rocky ground while the water flows in the distance. The atmosphere is hazy with limited visibility beyond the immediate rocks.

events.description: leaving the rocky stream area and returning to the forest trail

agents.ego_description: walking away from the stream along the dirt trail through the forest

entered.detail: grass-covered embankment rising on the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the rocky stream behind and returns to the dirt forest trail. A grassy slope rises on the left while large rocks now appear on the right. The character continues walking through the rainy night, with the flashlight beam cutting through the darkness ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a rain-drenched forest that transitions from a narrow wooded trail to a rocky stream crossing before returning to the dark woods. It begins with the character navigating a dirt path lined with tall pine trees and dense bushes, where a sudden flash of lightning briefly illuminates the canopy above. As the trail gives way to rugged terrain, the camera follows the character carefully picking their way across large, wet boulders beside a flowing stream. The scene then pauses on a rocky outcrop to survey the hazy, misty surroundings and sparse vegetation before the character descends back toward the forest floor. Finally, the movement shifts back to the dirt trail, passing a grassy slope and large rocks as the flashlight beam cuts through the rainy night.
